onset.Description: Onset of event, measured in terms of task start during EEG acquisiton (0 marks start of task).

sample.Description: Onset of event in terms of sampling scheme recording modality (latency)

type.Description: Type of trial in experimental condition

Levels.SyncStatus: Status of phase synchronization between EEG equipment and MRI scanner
Levels.Stimulus: Event code from task sent from stimulus PC
Levels.Response: Response code from scanner during acquisition of functional MRI

value.Description: Event codes recorded during EEG acquisition

Levels.S11: Rest trial 1s onset, code appears every 1 second during rest block
Levels.S12: Rest trial 2s onset, code appears every 2 seconds during rest block
Levels.S26: Checkerboard trial 1s onset, code appears every 1 second during checkerboard block
Levels.S27: Checkerboard trial 2s onset, code appears every 2 seconds during checkerboard block
